problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference directly addresses this.
